title: Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
